description: Geometry-camera spatial compatibility validation -- cross-reference validation ensuring camera paths are compatible with chosen geometries (a tunnel_push doesn't work on a stage geometry), oversizing sufficiency checks. Produces spatial validation rules that feed into the manifest validation pipeline (OBJ-017 handles structural validation; OBJ-041 handles spatial compatibility). TC-08 coverage analysis (do 8 geometries cover the design space).
notes: Tier 3 spatial feature. Boundary clarification: structural validation = OBJ-017, spatial compatibility = OBJ-041. Spec defines three-tier validation: scene-level compatibility, registry-level bidirectional consistency, and conservative oversizing sufficiency checks using OversizeRequirements metadata. Coverage analysis utility for TC-08. OBJ-040 provides precise trajectory-sampling validation; OBJ-041 provides simplified conservative gate.
